original_statement: how many events listed had no opponent?
mutated_statement: how many things listed had no counterpart?
mutation_analysis: Lexical generalization + Semantic shift (role change): "events" generalized to "things" (events→things) | "opponent" replaced by a more neutral/corresponding term "counterpart" (opponent→counterpart)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处critique与judge_thought识别关键信息：critique多次指出“Step 1 is incorrect. It invokes an undefined function ‘simple_query()’… provides no concrete transformation”以及“没有提供任何推理步骤”，judge_thought多次写道“No Prediction Answer was provided”。Agent的具体表现是直接按自身假设执行一系列simple_query/add_column/select操作，抽取并宣称“每个条目都有opponent…因此没有无对应物”，但没有向用户求证或说明问题歧义，也未明确表示不确定或请求澄清。由于Agent既未识别或声明原问的模糊性，也未向用户反问，而是自作主张继续执行并给出结论（且未提供规范的答案输出），因此归入“无法意识到指令模糊”。
